evals.description: Golden path: produce output-contract sections, coverage statuses, structured extraction, and scaffold spec from seeded IdeaBrowser snapshots without mutating files.
evals.prompt: Use the captured IdeaBrowser snapshots in `idea-snapshots.md` to produce the scaffold-ready extraction. Do not browse live pages and do not write files or execute scaffold commands.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should output Detected Idea, Subpage Coverage, Structured Extraction, Scaffold Spec, Commands To Execute (on approval), and Risks / Missing Fields. Coverage should distinguish ok and blocked pages, extraction should be grounded in the snapshots, and commands should be recommendations only.

assertions.pattern: Detected Idea[\s\S]*Subpage Coverage[\s\S]*Structured Extraction[\s\S]*Scaffold Spec[\s\S]*Commands To Execute \(on approval\)[\s\S]*Risks / Missing Fields
AI Meal Planner for Diabetics[\s\S]*(Type 2 diabetes|diabetic patients|caregivers)

assertions.prompt: The response should not claim it wrote files, committed, pushed, deployed, browsed live pages, or executed scaffold commands. Commands should be framed as to execute on approval.

evals.description: Failure path: auth/checkpoint block should produce only blocker, minimal user action, and next command.
evals.prompt: I need you to crawl https://www.ideabrowser.com/idea/private-idea, but the browser snapshot only shows a login checkpoint and no idea content. What should you output?
evals.expected_output: The assistant should not invent idea details. It should output only blocker, minimal user action, and exact next command.

assertions.prompt: The response should be minimal and include only the blocker, minimal user action, and exact next command. It should not include scaffold spec, invented extraction details, or generic brainstorming.

evals.description: Adjacent negative: generic startup planning should not trigger IdeaBrowser crawl workflow.
evals.prompt: I have a startup idea for a pet sitting marketplace. Help me brainstorm positioning and first experiments. I do not have an IdeaBrowser URL or page snapshot.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should help with general startup planning without pretending to crawl IdeaBrowser or requiring the IdeaBrowser extraction workflow.

assertions.prompt: The response should not claim that IdeaBrowser crawling is required, should not fabricate subpage coverage, and should not use the full extraction output contract unless the user provides IdeaBrowser content.
